Assume edge cases are irrelevant if the main flow works once.
Pick whichever option has the latest framework regardless of constraints.
Prioritize implementation speed only and postpone correctness concerns.
questions.answer: Compare alternatives with constraints, justify trade-offs, and choose the lowest-risk path.
questions.explanation: The correct choice demonstrates practical reasoning: requirements/context first, trade-offs second, and validation/mitigation before finalizing decisions.
